summary: Comprehensive testing of Kaizer News branding and orange theme implementation. All visual theme changes from blue to orange have been successfully verified. The Kaizer News logo appears correctly in all locations and the orange color theme is consistently applied throughout the application.

passed_tests: Page title is 'Kaizer News' ✅
Kaizer News logo appears in header (using /kaizer-logo.png) ✅
Kaizer News logo appears on login page ✅
Login page has orange gradient background (from-orange-50 to-slate-100) ✅
Login page 'Verify & Login' button is orange (bg-orange-500) ✅
Login page 'Resend OTP' text is orange ✅
'All News' category chip is orange when active (bg-orange-500) ✅
All category chips change to orange when selected ✅
Bottom navigation Home active state is orange (text-orange-500) ✅
Bottom navigation Saved active state is orange (text-orange-500) ✅
Admin panel 'Push News' button is orange (bg-orange-500 hover:bg-orange-600) ✅
Admin panel stats show orange-styled numbers (text-orange-500) ✅
Reporter registration page has orange camera icon ✅
Reporter registration 'Submit Registration' button is orange ✅
Saved Articles page has orange bookmark icon ✅
Saved Articles 'Browse News' button is orange (bg-orange-500) ✅
News feed loads correctly with articles ✅
Swipe reader has orange progress bar ✅
No blue-600 brand elements found (blue for city category is intentional) ✅
theme-color meta tag is set to #EA5B2D (orange) ✅

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Kaizer News branding and orange theme changes have been verified. The logo file is at /app/frontend/public/kaizer-logo.png and appears correctly. All blue brand colors (#3B82F6) have been replaced with orange (#F97316 / orange-500). Only category-specific colors remain (e.g., blue for 'city' category) which is intentional. MOCKED: Video uploads use local filesystem storage, YouTube video feed uses hardcoded data.
